---
name: Implementation Task
description: Build a conforming runtime, SDK, plugin, transport, or device implementation
title: "[IMPL] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Implementation Surface

What is being implemented?

- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Plugin
- [ ] Transport
- [ ] Device implementation
- [ ] Test harness
- [ ] Tooling

## Specification Owner

Link the specification, ADR, or RFC that authorizes this work.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what the implementation must do.

## Non-Goals

List what this implementation must not define or change.

## Validation

- [ ] Conformance tests pass
- [ ] Compatibility tests pass
- [ ] Generated bindings are not manually edited
- [ ] Behavior maps back to the specification

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] Implementation is contract-compliant
- [ ] No hidden architecture was introduced
- [ ] Errors are structured when applicable
- [ ] Documentation references platform specs
